items.title: Menzies' match is abandoned after he requires medical attention
items.summary: Cameron Menzies has withdrawn from the World Matchplay of Darts after becoming unwell during his second-round match against Ross Smith.

items.summary: Tottenham made a winning start to pre-season with a 1-0 victory over newly-promoted League One side MK Dons at Hotspur Way.

items.summary: Arsenal confirm defender William Saliba is set to miss an "extended period" after suffering a back injury while at the World Cup with France.

items.title: Villa agree loan deal for Chelsea winger Garnacho
items.summary: Aston Villa agree a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho until the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy.

items.summary: LIVERPOOL’S links with Amazon tycoon Jeff Bezos could deliver the club to the next level. The Reds finished fifth last season – a mammoth 25 points behind Premier League winners Arsenal. items.title: Salt stars as Fire end eight-match Hundred losing streak against Brave
items.summary: Phil Salt weathered a bowling storm from England fast bowler Jofra Archer as the Welsh Fire captain led his side to a six-wicket victory over Southern Brave in The Hundred.

items.title: Inter Miami under investigation after signing Casemiro
items.summary: Major League Soccer says it is investigating allegations of tampering by Inter Miami after the club signed Brazil midfielder Casemiro.

items.title: Swansea sign New Zealand winger Just from Motherwell
items.summary: Elijah Just joins the Championship club after scoring three goals during an impressive World Cup with New Zealand.

items.title: Wrexham win on Women's Champions League debut
items.summary: Wrexham Women celebrate their Champions League debut with a thrilling 4-2 victory against FC Pyunik in the first qualifying round semi-final at the Racecourse.

items.summary: ARGENTINIAN football fans were attacked in a horrifying shooting as their bus travelled home from a match.
